title: Squirrel Removal in Gerritsen Beach, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Gerritsen Beach, Brooklyn. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Licensed experts serving Gerritsen Beach homes. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Gerritsen Beach residents know that squirrels can quickly turn from charming neighborhood visitors to destructive attic invaders. Our professional squirrel removal services protect your Gerritsen Beach home from damage caused by nesting, chewing through electrical wires, and contamination. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective squirrel removal with comprehensive exclusion work to keep your property squirrel-free year-round.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Gerritsen Beach homeowners for years with specialized knowledge of the unique wildlife challenges facing this waterfront community. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping methods, perform thorough attic inspections, seal all entry points, and provide cleanup services to restore your home's safety and comfort.
localContext: Gerritsen Beach's tree-lined streets and proximity to Marine Park and Sheepshead Bay create an ideal habitat for squirrels seeking shelter in residential attics and crawl spaces. The neighborhood's mix of single-family homes, many with mature trees and landscaping, makes properties particularly vulnerable to squirrel intrusions during fall and winter months when these animals seek warm nesting sites.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Gerritsen Beach?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Gerritsen Beach typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work to seal entry points, and initial cleanup. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Gerritsen Beach attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls, especially during early morning and evening hours, visible entry holes near your roofline or soffits, chewed wood or wires, droppings in the attic, and squirrels spotted entering or exiting your roof. If you notice any of these signs in your Gerritsen Beach home, contact us for a professional inspection.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Gerritsen Beach humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, ethical squirrel removal methods that comply with New York wildlife regulations. We use live traps and one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit safely but prevent re-entry. We never use poisons or inhumane methods, and we ensure any babies are safely removed with their mothers when present.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Gerritsen Beach home?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Gerritsen Beach service calls within 24 hours for inspections. The removal process usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and their behavior patterns. Once all squirrels are removed, we immediately seal entry points and can schedule attic cleanup and damage repair to prevent future infestations.
